zh: 生活技能升级路线改为按目标等级区间汇总展示。
生活技能计算新增“单项 / 全部”范围选择。
优化生活技能工具栏的响应式布局。
en: Changed Skilling upgrade routes to summarize the target level range.
Added Single / All calculation scope to the Skilling planner.
Improved the responsive layout of the Skilling toolbar.

zh: 生活技能模拟新增采摘。
新增采摘加工效果暂未计入的提示。
强化模拟导入快照改为仅在当前页面会话保留。
en: Added Foraging to the Skilling planner.
Added a notice that Foraging processing effects are not yet included.
Changed imported Enhancement snapshots to remain only for the current page session.

zh: 新增生活技能优化模式。
升级路线改为整级模拟与逐级重算。
完善生活技能候选与路线展示。
生活技能导入快照改为仅在当前页面会话保留。
en: Added Skilling optimization modes.
Changed upgrade routes to full-level simulation and per-level recalculation.
Improved Skilling candidate and route presentation.
Changed imported Skilling snapshots to remain only for the current page session.

zh: 新增生活技能升级推荐器。
新增生活技能路线总览与逐级明细。
主站一键导入脚本新增生活技能导入。
en: Added the Skilling Upgrade Planner.
Added Skilling route overviews and per-level details.
Added Skilling imports to the main-site import script.

zh: 战斗模拟器新增公会神龛增益：可为每名角色配置力量、节奏、精神、稀有和学者五项战斗 Buff，并计入普通区域、地下城与迷宫模拟。
主站导入脚本现在会结合角色已购买等级和当前公会神龛等级，自动导入实际生效的神龛 Buff。
统一模拟器中的游戏实体名称为官方翻译，修复强化茶饮、装备槽、战斗属性及地下城/迷宫等位置仍使用本地自建词条的问题。
en: Added guild shrine buffs to combat simulation. Force, Tempo, Spirit, Rarity, and Scholar combat buffs can be configured per player and now affect zones, dungeons, and labyrinths.
The main-site import script now combines purchased buff levels with the current guild shrine caps to import each effective shrine buff level.
Unified game entity names across the simulator with the official translations, replacing remaining local labels for enhancement teas, equipment slots, combat stats, dungeons, and labyrinths.

zh: 游戏词条改为使用官网当前发布的中英文翻译快照，统一物品、技能、能力、动作、怪物、住宅、成就和战斗触发条件等名称。
强化模拟和设置页的物品搜索现在可同时匹配官方中文名、英文名和 HRID。
翻译资源现在随版本离线加载，并新增发布前的官方词条同步、来源记录和完整性校验流程。
en: Game terminology now uses snapshots of the official English and Chinese translations, unifying names for items, skills, abilities, actions, monsters, housing, achievements, and combat trigger metadata.
Item search on the Enhancement and Settings pages can now match official Chinese names, English names, and HRIDs at the same time.
Translation resources are now loaded offline with each release, backed by a pre-release synchronization, source-recording, and integrity-validation workflow.

zh: 主站导入脚本新增强化模拟页入口，可导入当前角色的强化等级、强化装备、饮品、房间、社区 Buff 和成就加成。
强化装备导入现在同时读取穿戴栏和背包；背包中没有穿戴装备的槽位会自动选择等级最高的装备。
en: The main-site import script now adds an Enhancement-page entry for importing the current character's enhancing level, gear, drinks, housing, community buffs, and achievement bonuses.
Enhancement gear imports now include both equipped and inventory items; when a slot has no equipped support gear, the highest-level inventory item is selected automatically.

zh: 新增强化模拟器：可选择目标装备、起始与目标强化等级，并结合强化等级、辅助装备、饮品、住宅、社区增益和成就计算成功率、耗时与经验。
新增保护策略对比：自动比较不保护及不同保护起始等级，结合市场价格、保护物、材料、金币和工时成本推荐最低期望投入方案。
新增贤者之镜制作规划与强化装备分解价值参考，并支持不可交易装备的地下城宝箱获取估值。
新增成本风险分析：通过蒙特卡洛模拟或矩估计近似展示 P25–P99 成本分位、预算内成功率、随机种子和模拟进度。
强化页面支持中英文界面、配置与收藏持久化、价格覆盖及官方物品图标。
en: Added the Enhancement Simulator for selecting target equipment and enhancement levels, with success rate, time, and experience calculations covering skill level, support gear, drinks, housing, community buffs, and achievements.
Added protection strategy comparisons across no-protection and multiple protection thresholds, recommending the lowest expected investment using market, protection, material, coin, and labor costs.
Added Philosopher's Mirror build planning, enhanced-item decomposition value references, and dungeon chest acquisition estimates for non-tradable equipment.
Added cost risk analysis with Monte Carlo simulation or moment-based approximation, including P25–P99 cost percentiles, success-within-budget probability, seeded runs, and progress reporting.
The Enhancement page includes bilingual UI, persistent configuration and favorites, price overrides, and official item icons.

zh: 修复配装与技能页中部分 95 级鞋子显示英文的问题；开路靴、探路靴、寻路靴以及它们的精炼版现在都会正确显示中文。
补齐相关制作项和材料名称的中文显示，查看配装、材料和制作信息时更容易对上装备。
en: Fixed some level 95 boots showing English names on the Loadout & Skills page. Pathbreaker, Pathfinder, and Pathseeker Boots, including refined versions, now show Chinese names correctly.
Added Chinese names for the related crafting entries and materials, making loadouts, materials, and crafting info easier to match.

zh: 推荐刷图扫描更稳：默认快速扫描轮数由 1 提升到 3，复核轮数由 10 提升到 20，同一目标多次扫描的排名波动明显减小；扫描耗时相应增加约 2.3 倍。
推荐刷图设置新增“快速扫描轮次”（可在 1–10 之间调节），按需在速度和精度之间权衡。
排名公式优化：收益高但每轮波动稍大的目标不再被过度压低，排名更贴近实际收益预期。
en: Advisor scans are more stable: default quick-scan rounds raised from 1 to 3 and refine rounds from 10 to 20, noticeably reducing ranking swings between consecutive scans of the same target. Scan time roughly 2.3x.
Added a Quick Rounds setting under Advisor (range 1–10), letting you trade off scan speed against precision.
Tuned the ranking formula so high-yield targets with naturally noisier per-run results are no longer over-penalised and rank closer to their real expected payoff.

zh: 同步官方最新游戏数据：护符类装备（基础/进阶/专家/宗师）补充描述文案，明确说明其将战斗经验聚焦到对应技能
多件护甲装备新增“反伤伤害”属性，精炼加成同步包含该属性
迷宫卷轴（采集/美食/加工/稀有发现/智慧）描述更新，明确标注仅在迷宫外生效；新增迷宫代币分解产物
成就“地下城精炼师”更名为“精炼师”，描述扩展为包含迷宫装备精炼
en: Synced with the latest official game data: charm equipment (Basic/Advanced/Expert/Grandmaster) now has descriptions clarifying that they focus combat experience to the corresponding skill
Multiple armor items now include a defensive damage stat, with enhancement bonuses also covering this attribute
Labyrinth scrolls (Gathering/Gourmet/Processing/Rare Find/Wisdom) descriptions updated to note they are only effective outside the Labyrinth; they can now be decomposed into labyrinth tokens
Achievement "Dungeon Refiner" renamed to "Refiner" with expanded description including labyrinth equipment refining

zh: 设置页新增“成本分口径”，现在可以在严格成本和综合成本之间切换。
设置页的队列配置重组为“评分模型 / 执行与线程 / 采样与统计”三块，并新增“性能分内部优先级”，可以用收益和 XP 权重决定剩余权重如何自动分配到 DPS 与 Kills。
多轮结果页和导出表头会显示当前使用的成本分口径，排名规则更容易看懂。
多轮结果页现在也会展示当前性能子权重与中位数融合比例，综合成本和稳健聚合的计算方式更直观。
调整评分权重、性能分内部优先级、中位数融合比例或成本分口径后，已有多轮结果会立即按新规则重新排名，不用重新模拟。
en: Added a Cost Score Metric option in Settings, so you can switch between Strict and Composite cost scoring.

Reorganized Queue Configuration in Settings into Scoring, Execution, and Sampling sections, and added Performance Priorities so Profit and XP weights can control how the remaining share is automatically split into DPS and Kills.
Multi-round Results and export headers now show the current cost-score metric, making the ranking easier to understand.
Multi-round Results now also show the active performance subweights and median-blend breakdown, so the composite cost metric and robust aggregation are easier to interpret.
Changing score weights, performance priorities, median blend, or the cost-score metric now reranks existing multi-round results immediately, without rerunning simulations.

zh: 队列新增独立“基准轮次”设置，“设为基准”现在会按该轮数执行多轮基准聚合；设置页、多轮结果页和相关摘要也会同步显示基准轮次与完成样本数。
基准轮次默认值调整为 1；首次从顶部点击“设为基准”时会弹出提醒，明确显示当前基准轮数，并提供“我已知晓，并不再弹出”和“去设置”两个操作。
修复“每0.01%提升所需金币”在负提升场景下会静默剔除非正值、导致均值严重偏差的问题；现在只有当 DPS、利润、XP/h 和击杀/h 四项最终稳健增幅全部为正时才显示严格成本，否则统一记为 N/A。
多轮结果新增“综合每0.01%所需金币”参考列，并同步优化严格成本列的命名、说明文案与导出展示，帮助更直观地区分严格口径和综合口径。
en: Queue runs now have an independent Baseline Rounds setting, and Set Baseline performs a multi-round aggregated baseline using that count. Settings, Multi-round Results, and related summaries now also show baseline rounds and completed samples.

The default baseline round count is now 1. On the first top-bar Set Baseline click, a reminder dialog shows the current baseline round count and offers both "I understand, don't show again" and "Go to Settings" actions.

Fixed the Gold per 0.01% metric silently dropping non-positive gains in negative-upgrade cases, which could heavily skew the average. The strict cost metric now appears only when the final robust DPS, profit, XP/h, and kills/h deltas are all positive; otherwise it is shown as N/A.

Added a new Composite Gold per 0.01% reference column in Multi-round Results, and clarified the strict-cost column naming, explanatory copy, and export display so strict and composite cost views are easier to distinguish.

zh: 战斗区域遭遇节奏重新对齐官方通用规则：普通 Zone 的下一场遭遇固定按 3 秒刷新，不再把地图基础行动耗时误当成每场遭遇之间的冷却时间。
多怪区刷怪逻辑重新校准为按权重可重复抽取，并在首次超出怪物总强度上限时停止，修复在单人和多人模拟下战斗次数与总经验偏差过大的问题。
en: Zone encounter cadence has been realigned with the official generic rule set: regular zone encounters now always respawn after a fixed 3 seconds, instead of incorrectly treating each map's baseTimeCost as the cooldown between every encounter.

Multi-monster spawn generation has been recalibrated to use weighted repeatable rolls that stop on the first maxTotalStrength overflow, Fixed the issue where the number of battles and total experience deviated too much in single and multiplayer simulations.

zh: 战斗模拟现在会读取地图基础行动耗时，并将每场遭遇的最短节奏纳入下一波敌人刷新时间，避免刷图节奏被计算得过快。
这项节奏修正已同步应用到刷图推荐、首页 Zone 模拟与队列推荐模拟，相关收益、击杀频率与排行结果会更接近官方实际表现。
补充官方节奏对齐回归测试，覆盖遭遇节奏下限与 Jungle Planet 的 EPH 区间，便于后续继续校验模拟精度。
en: Combat simulation now reads each zone's baseTimeCost and applies the minimum encounter cadence to the next enemy respawn timing, preventing farming pace from being simulated too quickly.
This cadence fix now applies to Advisor recommendations, Home zone simulations, and queue recommendation runs, so profit, kill frequency, and rankings better match official behavior.
Added regression coverage for official cadence parity, including the encounter cadence floor and the Jungle Planet EPH band, to keep future simulation accuracy easier to verify.

zh: 首页“战斗属性”预览现在会按当前地图或迷宫上下文计算，并同步计入房屋常驻加成、MooPass、社区经验/掉落 Buff 与迷宫箱子效果，展示结果更接近真实开战状态。
食物、饮料、技能与任务徽章现在会在战斗属性面板中标出各自带来的属性变化；饮料与技能高亮会按触发条件、开场顺序和目标敌人重新计算，避免显示实际不会生效的增益链。
兼容保留旧版导入与主站导入中的任务徽章数据，用于首页预览任务伤害加成；该预览数据不会写入正式战斗模拟装备，避免展示专用效果误入实战模拟。
en: The Home "Battle Attributes" preview now evaluates stats in the active zone or labyrinth context, including housing permanent bonuses, MooPass, community XP/drop buffs, and labyrinth crate effects, so the panel better matches real combat start state.

Foods, drinks, abilities, and task badges now show per-source stat deltas in the Battle Attributes panel. Drink and ability highlights are recalculated from effective trigger state, opener order, and targeted enemies so inactive buff chains are no longer shown as active.
Legacy and main-site imports now preserve task badge data for Home preview-only task damage highlights, without carrying those preview-only items into actual combat simulation loadouts.

zh: 队列多轮模拟现已支持将食物、饮料与技能的触发器修改加入队列，方便批量比较不同触发方案的收益与表现
队列项名称与详情中的触发器状态展示同步优化，默认、禁用、自定义之间的前后变化提示更准确
en: Queue multi-round simulations now support adding food, drink, and ability trigger changes into queue items, making it easier to batch-compare the returns and performance of different trigger setups.
Queue item names and trigger-state details have been refined together, with more accurate before/after hints across default, disabled, and custom states.

zh: 首页迷宫区域下拉框改为走 i18n 显示，中文环境下迷宫名称不再直接显示原始英文名
迷宫箱子区域补齐咖啡箱、食物箱与茶叶箱三类下拉框，茶叶箱现在提供基础/进阶/专家三档可选数据
“补给箱”文案调整为更明确的箱子区域展示，并补充茶叶箱相关中英文翻译词条
en: The Home labyrinth selector now uses i18n labels, so labyrinth names no longer show as raw English in Chinese.
The labyrinth crate section now includes coffee, food, and tea crate dropdowns, with basic, advanced, and expert tea crate options.
The "Supply Crate" wording has been adjusted to clearer crate-area copy, and tea-crate related Chinese and English translations have been added.

zh: 主入口改为读取预生成的轻量游戏数据索引，首页、队列页、多轮结果页与设置页减少大体积数据直载，首次加载压力更低
首页战斗预览与设置页价格表等热点区域减少重复重算，频繁切换角色、调整配置或浏览价格时交互更流畅
Home 页批量 Zone / Labyrinth 模拟现在会正确沿用设置页保存的并行 worker 上限，刷新后再次运行也不会丢失该配置
补充优化路线与行为说明，便于后续跟踪性能调整与并行模拟配置
en: The main entry now loads a prebuilt lightweight game data index, reducing heavy direct data loads on Home, Queue, Multi-round Results, and Settings for a lighter first load.
Hot paths such as Home combat preview and Settings price tables now avoid repeated recomputation, making frequent character switches, config edits, and price browsing smoother.
Batch Zone / Labyrinth simulations on the Home page now correctly reuse the worker limit saved in Settings, and the setting no longer disappears after refresh.
Added optimization notes and behavior documentation to make future performance tuning and parallel simulation changes easier to track.

zh: 队列收益模拟支持多人场景：设为基准时会冻结当前已选队伍，并在队列运行时带上队友一起参与模拟
队列变体仍只针对当前玩家生成与排序，避免多人组队时把队友收益错误叠加到当前玩家结果中
当队伍成员或队友配置在基准之后发生变化时，队列会提示重新设置基准，防止旧基准与新队伍混用
队列页、多轮结果页、设置页和顶部操作区新增“冻结队伍”摘要与过期提示，方便确认当前模拟口径
en: Queue profit simulations now support party play: setting a baseline freezes the currently selected party and includes teammates during queue runs.
Queue variants are still generated and ranked only for the active player, preventing teammate gains from being incorrectly folded into the active player's comparison.
When party members or teammate configs change after the baseline is set, the queue now prompts you to reset the baseline so old baselines are not mixed with a new party.
Queue, Multi-round Results, Settings, and the top action bar now show a "locked party" summary and stale warning so you can confirm the current simulation scope.

zh: 更新日志改为仅维护在 patchNote.json 中，首页弹窗与后续版本说明统一共用这一份数据源
移除设置页中的更新日志区域，入口调整为顶部悬浮栏按钮手动打开
首页更新日志不再自动弹出；存在未读版本时，顶部按钮会高亮闪烁提醒
首次切换到新未读机制时，历史更新日志默认标记为已读，避免旧版本持续闪烁
en: Patch notes are now maintained only in patchNote.json, and both the Home dialog and future version announcements share the same data source.
The patch notes section has been removed from Settings, and the entry is now opened manually from the top floating bar button.
Home patch notes no longer open automatically; when unread versions exist, the top button now highlights and flashes as a reminder.
When migrating to the new unread mechanism, historical patch notes are marked as read by default so old versions do not keep flashing.

zh: 新增版本更新公告功能：支持按公告 ID 记录已读，并将多条未读版本说明合并弹窗展示
公告支持中英文内容、顶部聚焦与独立滚动查看，长内容阅读更稳定
同一版本公告仅提醒一次；后续新版本发布后会自动补发未读内容
修复混合有/无日期公告时的排序问题，保证多版本公告展示顺序稳定
en: Added version announcement support: announcements can track read state by announcement ID and merge multiple unread versions into a single dialog.
Announcements now support Chinese and English content, top-focused layout, and independent scrolling for more stable reading of long content.
Each version announcement is only reminded once; newly released versions will automatically deliver any unread content later.
Fixed ordering when announcements with and without dates are mixed, keeping multi-version announcement order stable.

zh: 主站导入脚本完成合规性整改：导入流程调整为“当前角色直导 + 手动缓存队友资料补全”
脚本不会主动调用游戏 HTTP API，也不会自动发送 view_profile 或自动操作玩家资料弹窗
队伍导入仅使用你手动打开并缓存过的队友资料，缺失成员会跳过并提示
补充主站导入脚本的使用方式、限制说明与隐私说明
en: The main-site import script has completed compliance adjustments: the import flow is now "direct current character import + manual cached teammate profile completion".
The script no longer actively calls game HTTP APIs, automatically sends view_profile, or auto-operates player profile dialogs.
Party import now uses only teammate profiles that you have manually opened and cached; missing members are skipped with a prompt.
Added usage instructions, limitations, and privacy notes for the main-site import script.

2026年2月27日: 多轮评分去极值、评分排名支持无效 0 分标记
新增“设置”页：支持队列评分权重与并行线程上限配置、玩家配置快照
2026年2月25日: 多轮模拟改为“按轮次推进”，并在运行中实时更新原始数据与排名
评分排名新增“模拟次数”列（已完成/总轮次）与 Top1-Top5 分色高亮
评分权重调整为：性能45% + 稳定20% + 成本35%
评分并入稳健统计：Winsorize(5%)、中位数融合、置信度惩罚
多轮汇总新增评分指标解释，并补充中英文文案
修复换装后成本不显示：首页与队列结果支持按槽位净成本（买入-卖出）计算与录入
优化评分排名队列项文案：换装显示“旧装备 -> 新装备(+等级)”并清理名称空格
导入/导出弹窗输入框占位符接入 i18n（中英文）
调整语言切换按钮定位并更新页脚致谢
新增迷宫模拟：支持单迷宫/全迷宫、房间等级与补给箱配置
2026年2月24日: 新增装备变化模拟功能
新增队列多轮模拟，支持预设/自定义轮次（1-200）与并行、串行两种执行模式
新增“多轮结果”页面，提供汇总信息、评分排名和每轮原始数据（含DPS/利润/XP/h/Kills/h变化）
加入多轮综合评分模型：性能55% + 稳定20% + 成本25%，用于队列项排序
成本分析纳入升级成本、购买所需时间与“每0.01%提升所需金币（均值）”指标
补充中英文菜单与多轮模拟相关文案，并在基准或队列变更后清空旧多轮结果避免误读
2026年2月1日: 修正战斗等级计算的精度
修正地下城完成或失败后重新进入战斗的时间间隔 by wangchyan
修正诅咒和削弱的持续时间 by wangchyan
修正诅咒和狂怒的触发逻辑 by wangchyan
